name: record_scoring
description: Record the scoring result for one (criterion, candidate) pair. Call exactly once per criterion.

criterion_id.description: The id of the criterion being scored, verbatim.

probability_meets.description: Probability the predicate is met on the current evidence.

supporting_evidence.description: 1-3 short quotes or paraphrases from the candidate profile that bear on the predicate. Empty array if the profile contains nothing relevant. Do NOT invent evidence.

field.description: Optional: the candidate-profile field this evidence quotes from. Used for hallucination sanity-check.

value.description: Optional: the literal value of the referenced field.

matches.description: Short quote or paraphrase from the profile.

missing_inputs.description: 0-3 short noun phrases naming evidence gaps that would resolve uncertainty. Do not invent items just to fill the array.

reasoning.description: 2-4 sentence trace: enumerated evidence, threshold check, burden actor, then implication for the probability.

burden_actor.description: Optional: the actor whose obligation drives this test.

burden_obligation_met.description: Optional: whether the burden actor's obligation is met by the enumerated evidence.
